## Problem

What workflow pain or limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change you want.

## Why This Fits `SpecKit for Projects`

Explain why this belongs in repository scaffolding, prompts, or validation rather than application-specific project code.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, sample artifact paths, or references if useful.
